en.title: Full Ausangate Circuit - 5 Days
en.description: The ultimate high-altitude experience. A full 5-day loop around the sacred mountain, allowing more time for photography, local interaction, and better acclimatization to the extreme environment.
includes: Horse support and extra weight allowance

itinerary.title: Cusco – Tinki – Upis
itinerary.description: Drive from Cusco to Tinki (3800m). Hike to Upis (4400m) while observing the massive north face of Ausangate.

itinerary.title: Upis – Arapa Pass – Pucacocha
itinerary.description: Cross the Arapa Pass (4850m). Descend into the Pucacocha valley, home to massive hanging glaciers.

itinerary.title: Pucacocha – Palomani Pass – Ausangate Cocha
itinerary.description: Climb to the Palomani Pass (5200m), the highest point of the trek. Panoramic views of the entire Cordillera Vilcanota.

itinerary.title: Ausangate Cocha – Jampa Pass – Pacchanta
itinerary.description: Cross the Jampa Pass (5080m), often seeing wild vicuñas and condors. Camp in the hot spring village of Pacchanta.

itinerary.title: Pacchanta – Tinki – Cusco
itinerary.description: A final morning enjoying the hot springs before a short hike back to Tinki and transport to Cusco.

es.title: Circuito Completo Ausangate - 5 Días
es.description: La experiencia definitiva de alta montaña. Un circuito completo de 5 días alrededor de la montaña sagrada, permitiendo más tiempo para fotografía, interacción local y mejor aclimatación.
includes: Nutrición de montaña de alta energía
Apoyo de caballos y carga extra
Kit completo de seguridad y oxígeno

itinerary.title: Cusco – Tinki – Upis
itinerary.description: Viaje de Cusco a Tinki (3800m). Caminata hasta Upis (4400m) observando la cara norte del Ausangate.

itinerary.title: Upis – Paso Arapa – Pucacocha
itinerary.description: Cruce del Paso Arapa (4850m). Descenso al valle de Pucacocha, hogar de masivos glaciares colgantes.

itinerary.title: Pucacocha – Paso Palomani – Ausangate Cocha
itinerary.description: Ascenso al Paso Palomani (5200m), el punto más alto del trek. Vistas panorámicas de toda la Cordillera Vilcanota.

itinerary.title: Ausangate Cocha – Paso Jampa – Pacchanta
itinerary.description: Cruce del Paso Jampa (5080m), avistando a menudo vicuñas salvajes y cóndores. Campamento en el pueblo de Pacchanta.

itinerary.title: Pacchanta – Tinki – Cusco
itinerary.description: Mañana final disfrutando de las aguas termales antes de una caminata corta a Tinki y transporte a Cusco.
